violations.description: Preventing contamination from equipment, utensils, and wiping cloths. — --Cloth for wiping food spills was not stored in sanitizing solution (at proper concentration) between uses. -Dry rag on hook behind the bar. Recommend storing in sanitation bucket.
Clean-in-place (CIP) equipment - Design and construction. — --Nonfood contact surface of clean in place equipment was not cleaned properly. -Area around fryers in need of cleaning.
Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Ventilation hood system was not cleaned properly and/or as frequently as required.
Toilet facilities. — --Women's toilet room was not provided with sufficient mechanical ventilation.

Design and construction of floors, walls, and ceilings. — --Floors, walls, and/or ceiling were not constructed or designed to be smooth, nonabsorbent, and easily cleanable. -Drop ceiling above kitchen area is stained and needs attention.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not maintained in good repair. -Back storage room has brown ceiling tiles in need of replacement.
Provided as required, designed, constructed, installed, maintained, and cleaned (1 pt deducted)
